rootCause.mechanism: B1A3 produced deltaHard=-1000 via isRoomAvailable(ctx, 0, ...) returning false (room 0 absent from roomById in I11 fixture). B1A6's new computeHC5AvailabilityPenalty short-circuits on currentRoomId <= 0 with return 0, removing this behavior.
rootCause.behaviorDiff: B1A3 code path: isRoomAvailable(ctx, newRoomId=0, ...) returns false → if (!newAvail) deltaHard += HARD_PENALTY. B1A6 code path: computeHC5AvailabilityPenalty returns 0 immediately for currentRoomId <= 0.

fix.approach: When slot moves from a position with non-empty effective room set to a position with empty effective room set, add -HARD_PENALTY to deltaHard. Directional (only INTO orphan, not OUT).
fix.rationale: Reproduces K22 expected deltaHard=-1000 for I11 without changing full score semantics (full score still treats room=0 as no-room and skips HC4/HC5/HC6). LAHC solver benefits from delta surfacing the transition.

verification.build: PASS (1 pre-existing Turbopack NFT warning, unchanged)

outOfScope: K22 expected (kept at locked 73/0/0/0 baseline; no fixture/expected changes)
full score (room=0 still treated as no-room, skipped)

fullVsDeltaDivergence.rationale: K22 expected locked based on B1A3 behavior. Full score treats room=0 as no-room (no penalty). Delta adds transition-into-orphan signal for LAHC solver. This divergence is intentional and documented.

residualRisks: WorkTime B-03 标签仍待 explicit close
